text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I'm out walking with Satono Diamond, we
spot Gold Ship looking awfully serious.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Maybe this much? Nah, gotta have more
capacity...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Do you have something on your mind, Golshi?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you, Satono... All right. I'll let you in on
this. C'mere.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now, what do you think when you look at this
pool?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Umm... It's really useful for training?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And... um... it'd be more fun if it were a little
bigger. It was so exciting to swim in those massive
pools they have overseas!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Exactly the answer I was looking for, Satty! You
get 564 points!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Wow! Thank you so much! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, this pool just might have enough capacity
for training...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
However! I believe in the potential of all
Umamusume! I want to pioneer a new field of vast
watery freedom for us all!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Golshi! I never realized you were thinking
about the good of all Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I am! And that's why I've decided...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna turn this pool into the Sea of Okhotsk!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The Sea of Okhotsk!
...The Sea of Okhotsk? What are we talking about
exactly?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Moving the Sea of Okhotsk into this pool! That
way, we can swim as far as we please and train as
long we want!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That sounds like a really large-scale project! Is it
even possible?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Probably! If every single student does a bucket
relay for like fifty years, then I'm sure it'll totally
work!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Well, setting aside whether it's practical or not, I
think it's a splendid ambition.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...And just hearing you talk about it has filled me
with excitement!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Sato, old girl... You always know just what to
say!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm fully on board with the idea of remodeling the
pool to make it bigger.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Let's make it happen, Golshi! I'll do all I can to
assist!
choice_data_list: You can train fine with the pool as it is.

Let's take this idea directly to the academy
directly!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's true, of course. But don't you think a
remodel will make it even better?
choice_data_list:
And spend your valuable time on a bucket
relay?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Urgh... You do make a valid point...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now you've put me in a pickle... I can hardly force
you to do it after being skewered by such a
logical retort.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But I will realize this dream one day. And until
then, I'll simply bide my time and keep my fangs
sharpened... with a cheese grater!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Sounds like a plan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two share a firm handshake.
When that day does arrive, I'll have to convince
her to give up again.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: In that case... how about we write up a proposal?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's genius! A solid plan'll make it easier to
persuade them!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehehe. This is becoming a lot of fun. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Time to initiate the "Sea of Okhotsk Pool
Conversion" plan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The project fails to get approval in the end, but
the whole ordeal was a good experience for
Satono Diamond!
